title: centaurea coerulescens var. tenuiloba
intro: Centaurea coerulescens var. tenuiloba, also known as Mountain Blue Centaury or Mountain Blue Knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Centaurea coerulescens var. tenuiloba include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. Centaurea coerulescens var. tenuiloba is often prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
